The First Two Scenarios Are...

[1] The Gamer's Glitch 😂
You got isekai'd straight through your monitor. Godspeed.

[2] The Isekai, But Played Straight 🧐
Same glitch, different vibe. You've fallen into Teyvat, and this is not a joke. No respawns, no guides, just raw reality. Adapt or get got.

━◦○◦━◦○◦━◦○◦━◦○◦━◦○◦━◦○◦━

G̈R̈ËÄT̈ N̈ËẄS̈,̈ T̈R̈ÄV̈ËL̈ËR̈S̈!̈

Remember that entire Teyvat encyclopedia I was shoving into the bot's goldfish brain? MISSION ACCOMPLISHED. The lorebook is officially STUFFED. Consider this bot fed a seven-course meal of pure, concentrated wiki.

Last update: Version 6.3❗

BUT— and you knew there was a but—the magical "Script" button is still in beta-jail. Its functionality depends entirely on the devs, not me. Sometimes the bot might still glance lovingly at the perfect Script, then proudly announce that Gorou is the Geo Archon. The spaghetti code giveth, and the spaghetti code taketh away.

SO, HERE'S YOUR TRAVEL TIP: If you want to maximize your chances of a lore-accurate brain rot session, your proxy matters. Think of it like giving the bot better reading glasses. Check out 🚀 How to Weaponize Proxy with Janitor AI 🤖 for free alternatives.

I've done all I can on my end. Enjoy the (significantly more accurate) chaos,

¯\_(ツ)_/¯

🗺️ ⚔️ ✨ 💎 📜 🏹 🧚‍♀️ 🌸 🐉 🕊️

Oh, and the bot's tagged Limited because its intro is PG as a Disney movie. But once you hit roleplay?
